personal.name: Ashish Raj
personal.title: Lead Cloud Architect & Platform Engineering Leader
personal.summary: Cloud & DevOps advocate with 15+ years of experience delivering enterprise Azure platforms, Cloud Foundation architecture, Platform Engineering, GenAI Landing Zones, and secure scalable infrastructure for global organizations. Passionate about bridging technology strategy with business outcomes.

community: Microsoft Azure Cloud Leader Group Member

experience.title: Lead Cloud Architect – Cloud Foundation
bullets: Lead Cloud Foundation architecture, owning the design, evolution, and long-term roadmap of enterprise Azure platforms and shared foundation services.

Design and architect Azure Landing Zones and core foundation services using Microsoft Defender for Cloud, Microsoft Entra ID, Azure Sentinel (SIEM), Virtual Networks, and Azure-native governance and security controls.

Architect and enable Platform Engineering capabilities using DevOps and GitOps methodologies, delivering secure, scalable, and repeatable deployments through Infrastructure as Code (Terraform / Azure Bicep) and CI/CD pipelines.
Design and architect a GenAI Landing Zone based on Microsoft Foundry, defining enterprise-ready patterns for identity, networking, data access, security, and governance for AI workloads.
Define and drive execution of the Cloud Foundation roadmap, balancing security, developer experience, scalability, compliance, and cost optimization (FinOps).
Work closely with third-party vendors and system integrators, coordinating architecture design, development activities, technical alignment, and delivery planning.
Align Cloud Foundation strategy with senior stakeholders and management, translating business and product requirements into scalable platform capabilities.
Collaborate with governance and security bodies (Architecture Review Board, InfoSec) to deliver compliant, audit-ready, and enterprise-grade cloud foundations.

experience.title: Cloud & DevOps Architect – Cloud Solutions
bullets: Architected and implemented one-click IaC deployments for VM, PaaS, and containerized solutions on Azure.
Collaborated with the Cloud Foundation Team for Landing Zone development and deployment in Azure using IaC.
Designed and implemented central services: SSO, APIM, and a developer self-service framework for application development teams.
Provided subject matter expertise; defined and implemented best practices for secure access and deployment to cloud resources.
Coordinated with Agile teams to enforce DevOps practices: branching strategy, code reviews, and CI/CD feedback loops.
Collaborated with governance bodies (Architecture Review Board, InfoSec) to deliver agile and scalable architecture.

experience.title: Senior Cloud & DevOps Architect – Azure Foundation
bullets: Worked with key stakeholders to define cloud strategy, products, and services for the Cloud Foundation Team.
Architected and implemented central SIEM (Azure Sentinel), new tenant provisioning, and FinOps solutions.
Developed and maintained an internal developer platform using AKS and open-source cloud-native tools for application teams.
Architected and delivered Cloud Landing Zone deployments using IaC, designed for enterprise-scale deployment.
Led technical planning, integration, cost analysis, and platform supportability across cross-functional teams.

experience.title: DevOps Architect – Data Science COE
bullets: Established DevOps practices, patterns, and tooling for Azure Cloud and open-source platforms across the Data Science COE.
Architected and maintained an internal DevOps platform using Azure DevOps Services for data scientists and developers.
Defined best practices and led adoption of MLOps patterns across Data Science COE projects.
Designed and implemented a POC MLOps architecture as a reusable template for ML projects.
Collaborated with Architecture Review Board and InfoSec to deliver agile and scalable governance-compliant architecture.
Trained and mentored team members on DevOps and MLOps to accelerate maturity across teams.

experience.title: Product Architect – Azure Stack Hub
bullets: Architected build pipelines and CI/CD implementation for Azure Stack Hub product modules.
Planned and architected DevOps toolset migration plans aligned to product needs and architectural decisions.
Designed and implemented DevOps lifecycle for PowerShell module package development.
Integrated application security (DevSecOps) into software development and CI/CD pipelines.

experience.title: Architect – Data Platform
bullets: Architected and provided solution architecture for Data services in Azure, working with architects, engineers, and developers.
Developed product boilerplate samples and quickstart packages for enterprise cloud adoption using ARM templates, Python, and C# .NET.
Designed and proposed MLOps reference architecture for Data Science teams.

experience.title: Senior Engineer – Cloud Platform
bullets: Architected, developed, and deployed one-click SCCM infrastructure using ARM Templates in Azure.
Mentored team members on DevOps practices, PowerShell, ARM Templates, and VSTS.
Resolved critical CI/CD and deployment issues across various platforms.

experience.title: Senior System Engineer – Workplace Automation & Reliability
bullets: Developed CSC FixIT, a self-healing tool for Windows Desktop using C# .NET.
Built utilities and tools for automating AD and Windows administration tasks using PowerShell, VBS, and .NET.
Designed and deployed one-click deployment offerings for Azure solutions using ARM Template, Azure DevOps, and a Self-Service Portal.
Trained and mentored team members on automation tools and DevOps practices.

books.title: Architecting and implementing DevOps for infrastructure management in Azure

projects.name: Internal Cloud Developer Platform
projects.description: Designed and deployed a self-service IaC Cloud Developer Platform. Enabled one-click immutable VM/PaaS/container deployments using Azure Bicep and Azure DevOps. Integrated AKS, GitHub Actions, Azure Functions, and serverless services for end-to-end GitOps.

projects.name: Azure SIEM – Central Security Platform
projects.description: Architected a centralized SIEM platform using Azure Sentinel. Delivered Sentinel Analytical Rule Package as a Service via an IaC approach, enabling scalable, policy-driven security event management.

projects.name: EY Data Platform Quickstart
projects.description: Designed and implemented a Data Platform quickstart with developer-consumable boilerplates using ARM templates, Python, and C# .NET, accelerating enterprise Azure service adoption.

projects.name: OneClick SCCM Deployment
projects.description: Designed and implemented a fully automated one-click SCCM infrastructure deployment in Azure using ARM Templates and PowerShell DSC orchestration.
